spans.text: the ingenuous Moralist , whose mind Science has stored , and Piety refined
the golden evening sails , And slowly sink the fancy-painted vales
Burke ! thy heart , by juster feelings
Burke ! thy heart , by juster feelings
Mourns that Philosophy , abstract and cold , Withering should smite life's fancy-flowered mould
the spirit of high Honour fled
Her tourneys bright , and pealing festivals
now on high her idle spear
that play In the short sunshine of life's early way
with sweet dreams sad thoughts to cheer
of bloodshed on the farthest shore Of injured Asia
the buried sorrows and the cries Of him who there , lost and forgotten
thy lofty mien , thy steady eye
The falcon wheels away his mournful flight
The falcon wheels away his mournful flight
soon the hurricane , in dismal shroud

So the dark fiend , rejoicing in her might , Pours desolation and the storm of night ; Before her dread career the good and just Fly far , or sink expiring in the dust ; Wide wastes and mighty wrecks around her lie , And the earth trembles at her impious cry
wastes and mighty wrecks around her lie
to Him alone , and His high will , Who bids the tempests of the world be still
bids the tempests of the world be still
we turn to Albion's happier plain
Where ancient Freedom holds her temperate reign
I might sometime hide a saddening thought
thy rocks and the green vales
Far off the fiend of Discord murmuring flies
the fiend of Discord murmuring flies

sad they journey through this cloudy bourn : If conscious Genius stamp their chosen breast , And on the forehead show her seal impressed , Perhaps they mourn , in bleak Misfortune's shade , Their age and cares with penury repaid ; Their errors deeply scanned , their worth forgot , Or marked by hard injustice with a blot

they journey through this cloudy bourn : If conscious Genius stamp their chosen breast , And on the forehead show her seal impressed , Perhaps they mourn , in bleak Misfortune's shade , Their age and cares with penury repaid ; Their errors deeply scanned , their worth forgot , Or marked by hard injustice with a blot
in bleak Misfortune's shade , Their age and cares with penury repaid
Our high sphere , like the radiance of the morn
